languages.text: Вольный Торговец угодил во временную петлю, раз за разом воссоздающую осаду Даргонуса. Необходимо найти способ не стать частью этого представления навеки.

traits.locale_text: Вольный Торговец угодил во временную петлю, раз за разом воссоздающую осаду Даргонуса. Необходимо найти способ не стать частью этого представления навеки.

languages.text: The Rogue Trader has fallen into a temporal loop, one that recreates the siege of Dargonus again and again. A way must be found to avoid becoming part of this spectacle for eternity.
languages.original_text: Вольный Торговец угодил во временную петлю, раз за разом воссоздающую осаду Даргонуса. Необходимо найти способ не стать частью этого представления навеки.

traits.locale_text: The Rogue Trader has fallen into a temporal loop, one that recreates the siege of Dargonus again and again. A way must be found to avoid becoming part of this spectacle for eternity.
The Rogue Trader has fallen into a temporal loop, one that recreates the siege of Dargonus again and again. A way must be found to avoid becoming part of this spectacle for eternity.
The Rogue Trader has fallen into a temporal loop, one that recreates the siege of Dargonus again and again. A way must be found to avoid becoming part of this spectacle for eternity.
The Rogue Trader has fallen into a temporal loop, one that recreates the siege of Dargonus again and again. A way must be found to avoid becoming part of this spectacle for eternity.

languages.text: {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} ist in eine Zeitschleife geraten, die immer und immer wieder die Belagerung von Dargonus wiederholt. Es gilt, einen Weg zu finden, nicht bis in alle Ewigkeit Teil dieses Spektakels zu sein.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has fallen into a temporal loop, one that recreates the siege of Dargonus again and again. A way must be found to avoid becoming part of this spectacle for eternity.

traits.locale_text: {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} ist in eine Zeitschleife geraten, die immer und immer wieder die Belagerung von Dargonus wiederholt. Es gilt, einen Weg zu finden, nicht bis in alle Ewigkeit Teil dieses Spektakels zu sein.

languages.text: {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} se trouve dans une boucle temporelle qui reproduit encore et encore le siège de Dargonus. Il faut trouver un moyen d'éviter de rejoindre les figurants de ce spectacle pour l'éternité.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has fallen into a temporal loop, one that recreates the siege of Dargonus again and again. A way must be found to avoid becoming part of this spectacle for eternity.

traits.locale_text: {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} se trouve dans une boucle temporelle qui reproduit encore et encore le siège de Dargonus. Il faut trouver un moyen d'éviter de rejoindre les figurants de ce spectacle pour l'éternité.

languages.text: 行商浪人陷入了时间循环，它一遍又一遍地重现达戈努斯之围。必须找到办法逃脱，以免永远沦为这场奇观中的展品。
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has fallen into a temporal loop, one that recreates the siege of Dargonus again and again. A way must be found to avoid becoming part of this spectacle for eternity.

traits.locale_text: 行商浪人陷入了时间循环，它一遍又一遍地重现达戈努斯之围。必须找到办法逃脱，以免永远沦为这场奇观中的展品。

languages.text: {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha caído en un bucle temporal que recrea una y otra vez el asedio de Dargonus. Es necesario hallar el modo de evitar formar parte de este espectáculo por toda la eternidad.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has fallen into a temporal loop, one that recreates the siege of Dargonus again and again. A way must be found to avoid becoming part of this spectacle for eternity.

traits.locale_text: {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha caído en un bucle temporal que recrea una y otra vez el asedio de Dargonus. Es necesario hallar el modo de evitar formar parte de este espectáculo por toda la eternidad.

languages.text: フリー・トレーダーは時間のループに巻き込まれ、ダーゴナス包囲戦を何度も再現している。永遠にこの光景の一部にならない方法を見つけなければならない。
languages.original_text: The Free Trader is caught in a time loop, recreating the siege of Dargonus time after time. A way must be found not to become part of this spectacle forever.

languages.text: Hür Tacir, Dargonus kuşatmasını tekrar tekrar canlandıran bir zaman döngüsüne düştü. Sonsuza dek bu gösterinin bir parçası olmaktan kurtulmanın bir yolu bulunmalı.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has fallen into a temporal loop, one that recreates the siege of Dargonus again and again. A way must be found to avoid becoming part of this spectacle for eternity.

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir, Dargonus kuşatmasını tekrar tekrar canlandıran bir zaman döngüsüne düştü. Sonsuza dek bu gösterinin bir parçası olmaktan kurtulmanın bir yolu bulunmalı.
